DOMComponentItem.name: Newgrounds.IO/components/Newgrounds.IO Connector

Actionscript.script: // if we get here, we did not install this component properly. stop();

DOMTextRun.characters: Waiting for user to log in...
Would you like to try again?
This game uses features that require a Newgrounds login.
Would you like to sign in now?
There was a problem connecting to the server.
Would you like to try again?
Would you like to go to the latest version of this game?
Would you like to play a legal copy of this game?
But for some reason, the parent clip didn't play....

DOMComponentItem.parametersAsXML: <property id="appId"> <Inspectable name="App ID" variable="appId" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property> <property id="encryptionKey"> <Inspectable name="Encryption Key" variable="encryptionKey" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property> <property id="appVersion"> <Inspectable name="App version" variable="appVersion" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property> <property id="debug"> <Inspectable name="Debug Mode" variable="debug" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property> <property id="showNetworkiMessages"> <Inspectable name="Show Network Messages" variable="showNetworkiMessages" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property>
